name: Sky Tower Residences
description: Ultra luxury penthouses offering panoramic city views. Designed by world-renowned architects to maximize light and space.

name: Golden Palm Villas
description: Exclusive beachfront villas with private infinity pools and expansive glass walls that blur the line between indoor and outdoor living.

name: Urban Heights
description: Modern luxury loft living in the heart of the cultural district. Features exposed brick, 20-foot ceilings, and polished concrete floors.

name: The Concrete Curation
description: A raw, powerful space that celebrates the beauty of structure. Hand-poured concrete surfaces and oversized industrial windows.

name: Mercer Heritage
description: An impeccably restored cast-iron floor-through residence. Traditional craftsmanship meets absolute modern convenience.

name: Glass Pavilion
description: A floating glass sanctuary surrounded by ancient pines. A testament to the mid-century modern aesthetic redefined.
